series_metadata.series_title: Responses to RFPs and related documents
series_metadata.series_description: Copies of bids submitted by companies in response to Requests for Proposals (RFPs), Request for Qualifications (RFQs), and Requests for Information (RFIs) published by the office of the Treasurer of State. Also includes documents used to evaluate the various bid submissions.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: two years expiration of contract which response RFP / RFI / RFQ was submitted. ; Electronic: two years expiration of contract which response RFP / RFI / RFQ was submitted
